fortune_decode: Agent second brain. 11 sessions distilled. Latest: 2026-05-15 evening. Projects: repo-copilot, parallel-internet-sites. Top concepts: Commit 11 shipped — /start route live, Cal.com wired, score=0 error screen, booking URL confirmed. Remaining blockers: migration-v2.sql apply, QA checklist, TrueBuild demo label, AFO self-test, Jared sign-off.

notes.title: Commit 11 shipped — /start route, Cal.com CTA, score=0 error screen
new_concepts: start.html created with all 8 required fields + Turnstile + optional full-audit checkbox
TURNSTILE_SITE_KEY injected at serve time from env secret
CTA button hardwired to Cal.com URL
score=0 / unreachable site shows dedicated error screen with Try Again + Book Manual Check
sessionStorage fallback to query param if storage blocked
index.js imports start.html + results.html as static assets
notes.decisions: Cal.com chosen over Calendly — free plan, unlimited event types, developer-brand aligned. Booking URL = https://cal.com/jared-edwards-gscxmo. Unreachable error screen shows 🔌 icon + message + two CTAs (try again / book manual check). index.js now handles GET /start, GET /results, POST /api/visibility-snapshot. POST /api/audit-signup untouched.
notes.open_questions: Remaining blockers before go-live: (1) apply migration-v2.sql to prod D1, (2) run qa-checklist.md, (3) mark TrueBuild as demo on homepage, (4) run AFO self-test through snapshot, (5) Jared signs launch-readiness.md.

notes.title: AFO site architecture confirmed — Worker not Pages, /start not yet live
new_concepts: start.html exists as template but /start route not wired
TrueBuild still shown as real case study on homepage
notes.decisions: Worker name: afo-site. Custom domain: agentfeedoptimization.com. Source repo: parallel-internet-sites. /start must be wired as a route in the Worker handler. Turnstile key injected at serve time. CTA URL = agentfeedoptimization.com/start?source=snapshot-results.

notes.title: Brainstorm Q&A resolved — all 5 AFO snapshot open questions answered
notes.decisions: CTA URL = agentfeedoptimization.com/start?source=snapshot-results. Confirmation email deferred post-launch. Form on /start (no separate page). Score=0 gets dedicated error screen. AFO self-test required before public launch.

notes.title: BLT-020 filed — AFO Visibility Snapshot 10-commit build complete
notes.decisions: 10 commits shipped. POST /api/audit-signup untouched. BLT-020 filed for Brainstorm review.

notes.title: AFO funnel strategy correction — free tier is Visibility Snapshot not full audit
new_concepts: no LLM calls in free flow
notes.decisions: Free CTA = AFO Visibility Snapshot. Full audit = manual/paid/call-gated. TrueBuild = demo only.
